text:
is a booklet bundled with a special edition of Volume 34, available only in convenience stores. It was written and illustrated by Hajime Isayama.

The booklet contains the drafts of the last two chapters of the Attack on Titan manga.

Contents

The draft for Chapter 139 is that of the version published on ', not the one published in Volume 34, and therefore lacks the scene showing various points in the future of Paradis Island, as well as the scene featuring Mikasa's final words to Ymir before the latter's vanishing. That aside, the final versions of the chapters feature minor changes compared to the drafts.
